synthesis_text: COVID-19 is a contagious disease caused by the coronavirus SARS‑CoV‑2 [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00000][doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00024].
COVID-19 is an illness caused by the SARS‑CoV‑2 virus, and it began spreading at the end of 2019, becoming a pandemic in 2020. [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
COVID-19 is an infectious respiratory illness caused by the SARS‑CoV‑2 coronavirus; ‘CO’ stands for corona, ‘VI’ for virus, and ‘D’ for disease. [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000]
